title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions
company: Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Gurgaon location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions:
Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions!
